nasb.text: The woman answered and said, “I have no husband.” Jesus *said to her, “You have correctly said, ‘I have no husband’;

esv.text: The woman answered him, “I have no husband.” Jesus said to her, “You are right in saying, ‘I have no husband’;

cnv.text: 婦人對他說：“我沒有丈夫。”耶穌說：“你說‘沒有丈夫’是不錯的。

ccb.text: 妇人说：“我没有丈夫。”耶稣说：“你说的对，你没有丈夫，

csbs.text: 妇人回答说：“我没有丈夫。” 耶稣说：“你说你没有丈夫，这话没错。
